name: project-composer
description: Start, stop, and restart Docker Compose with per-stand env presets. By SSU Group.

projectComposeEnv.cleanNextOnStart.description: Remove .next folder before starting (rebuilt in container).

projectComposeEnv.cleanNodeModulesOnStar.description: Remove node_modules before starting (reinstalled in container).

projectComposeEnv.cleanYarnLockOnStart.description: Remove yarn.lock before starting (recreated in container).

projectComposeEnv.dockerCleanOnStop.description: Run full Docker cleanup after Project: Stop.

projectComposeEnv.restartServices.description: Space-separated compose service names to restart (e.g. "node"). Empty — restart all services.

projectComposeEnv.presetsPath.description: Path to env preset folder, relative to workspace root.

projectComposeEnv.envTargetFile.description: Target env file to merge presets into, relative to workspace root.

projectComposeEnv.composeFile.description: Docker Compose file path, relative to workspace root.

projectComposeEnv.openBrowserOnStart.description: After Project: Start, open configured URLs in the default browser.

projectComposeEnv.openUrls.description: URLs to open when openBrowserOnStart is enabled (e.g. http://web.localhost:4000).

projectComposeEnv.waitForContainers.description: Space-separated container name tokens to wait for in running state before opening browser (e.g. "node-1 storybook-1 nginx-1"). Matches compose container names by suffix.

projectComposeEnv.waitTimeoutMs.description: Max wait time for containers (running) and HTTP readiness (ms). Default: 5 minutes.

projectComposeEnv.waitForHttpOnStart.description: Before opening browser, poll openUrls until HTTP responds (avoids nginx 502 while Next.js is still starting).
